calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-24-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Linda S. Forster, #13286.
Petitioner Jeffrey Neal Wooley was present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the minor Steven Ryan Wooley, (incorrectly listed in the Court's computer system as Steven Ryan Wong) who was also present at today's hearing. Also present in Court was the minor's mother, Francine Wooley.

Proof of Service in file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Steven Robert Wooley.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
